answers: Camping essentials: tent, sleeping bag, pad, headlamp, fire starter, water filter, food, and first aid kit.
Beginner camping: start at established campgrounds with facilities. Practice setting up your tent at home first.
Camping tips: arrive before dark, keep food sealed (bears!), bring layers for cold nights, and leave no trace.
What to bring: tent, sleeping gear, cooking supplies, water, food, warm clothes, flashlight, bug spray, and a good attitude!
